jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Medtronic India
jsonLd.description:
Medtronic India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Medtronic India:
Medtronic India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medtronic India!
